entities.name: the small, dark fragments
entities.description: small, dark fragments embedded in the snow, radiating the same sterile, alien energy first sensed

entities.name: the crystalline growths
entities.description: small, crystalline growths glitter in the faint moonlight, not ice but something harder, purer, almost metallic in their sheen

entities.name: the barren strip
entities.description: a barren strip that snakes towards the mountains, where the sparse arctic vegetation seems to recoil from an invisible boundary line

entities.name: the thin, cold air pockets
entities.description: certain pockets of air feel thinner, colder, as if the life had been subtly leached from it

entities.name: the hexagonal melt pattern
entities.description: a patch of snow with an unnaturally perfect hexagonal melt pattern at its center, as if a geometric force had been pressed upon it
